register.title: Create account
register.description: Complete email verification after registration to unlock all features.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: We will send a password reset email to your inbox.

actions.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in

loading.title: Preparing account access
loading.description: Please wait. The page will be ready soon.

flash.signupEmailSent: Registration succeeded. A verification email has been sent. Verify your email before logging in.

confirm.title: Processing request
confirm.newEmailComplete: New email verification is complete. Returning to settings.
confirm.passwordReady: You can set a new password now.
confirm.passwordMismatch: The two new passwords do not match.
confirm.passwordSaved: New password saved. Returning to the previous page.
confirm.expiredLink: The auth link is missing required parameters. It may be expired or already used.
confirm.expiredSession: Your session expired. Log in again before verifying email.
confirm.authFailed: Authentication failed. Request a new email.

messages.alreadySignedIn: You are signed in as {username}. Go to Account Center to manage your profile.
messages.loginMissingSummary: Could not read account information after login
messages.captchaLoading: Security verification is still loading. Try again shortly.
messages.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.

turnstile.notConfiguredDescription: This environment cannot render the security verification widget until the required configuration is provided.
turnstile.loadFailed: Verification failed to load. Refresh and try again.

errors.loginCaptchaServer: Login is still limited by server-side captcha settings. The frontend login captcha has been removed; disable login captcha in Supabase to remove it completely.
errors.captchaFailed: Security verification failed. Complete it again and retry.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Could not connect to the auth service. Check Supabase environment variables and local network access.
errors.emailUnchanged: The new email must be different from the current email.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be {min}-{max} characters, include letters and numbers, allow ASCII symbols and spaces, and cannot start or end with a space.
errors.samePassword: The new password must be different from the current password.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again later.

validation.usernameRule: Username must be {min}-{max} characters and may include letters, numbers, spaces, symbols, and emoji
validation.usernameHint: Username must be {min}-{max} characters and may include letters, numbers, spaces, symbols, and emoji
validation.usernameDescription: Shown on account pages, comments, and similar surfaces.
validation.passwordPolicy: Password must be {min}-{max} characters, include letters and numbers, allow ASCII symbols and spaces, and cannot start or end with a space.
validation.passwordEdgeSpace: Password cannot start or end with a space.
validation.passwordCharacter: Password only supports half-width letters, numbers, symbols, and spaces.
validation.passwordLetterAndDigit: Password must include both letters and numbers.
